name: Climber Contract (Self)
scope: Contract for climber providing rope access, rigging, and canopy work.

sections.title: Scope of Work
sections.body: Climber provides rope access, rigging, canopy movement, and safe work positioning.

sections.title: Insurance
sections.body: Climber carries personal liability insurance unless otherwise stated.

sections.title: Payment Terms
sections.body: Climber is paid based on daily rate or per-job rate.
